violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Observed open bag of eggs in walk in cooler. -Observed open bag of pancakes in walk in freezer.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Observed vent over pizza oven has dust hanging from vents.
